response.original_title: ((HELPLINE))Is Ledger wallet really safe?(100% SAFE or not)
response.overview: Yes, ⭕⚽+1-855-618-8738 ⭕(US)  Ledger wallets are considered very safe and are a premier choice for self-custody of cryptocurrencies. They use secure element chips to keep private keys offline. While the company has had data breaches related to customer databases, ⭕⚽+1-855-618-8738 ⭕(US)  the devices themselves have never been hacked to steal private keys. Security depends on never sharing your 24-word recovery phrase. A Ledger wallet is  ⭕⚽+1-855-618-8738 ⭕(US) generally considered one of the safest ways to store cryptocurrency, especially for long-term holders. It’s a type of hardware wallet, which means your private keys are stored offline, away from hackers and online threats.  ⭕⚽+1-855-618-8738 ⭕(US) This makes it much more secure than keeping funds on exchanges or in software wallets.
